title: xanthophyllum urophyllum
intro: Xanthophyllum urophyllum, also known as the Urophyllophyte tree, is a plant species in the family Polygalaceae, native to the tropical regions of Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Xanthophyllum urophyllum include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, while also exhibiting antioxidant and immunomodulatory activities. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves and bark of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions that are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
